name: DeepImmuno
description: Given a sequence, test all peptides of length 9 for immunogenicity to a given HLA. Uses a CNN model which outperforms DeepHLApan and IEDB.
capabilities: Given a sequence, test all peptides of length 9 for immunogenicity to a given HLA
Uses a CNN model which outperforms DeepHLApan and IEDB

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence to test for immunogenicity (peptides of length 9 are scanned)

hla.description: HLA allele name for immunogenicity prediction (e.g., HLA-A*02:01)
